data.name: Barkform Harvester
data.oracle_text:
Changeling (This card is every creature type.)
Reach
{2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.
data.flavor_text: The farmers hide when it runs out of potatoes to harvest.

data.name: Bonebind Orator
data.oracle_text: {3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return another target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: A great actor can breathe new life into old material.

data.name: Builder's Talent
data.oracle_text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
When this Class enters, create a 0/4 white Wall creature token with defender.
{W}: Level 2
Whenever one or more noncreature, nonland permanents you control enter, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
{4}{W}: Level 3
When this Class becomes level 3, return target noncreature, nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Coiling Rebirth
data.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if the gift was promised and that creature isn't legendary, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's 1/1.

data.name: Consumed by Greed
data.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Target opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. If the gift was promised, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

data.name: Curious Forager
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may forage. When you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)
data.flavor_text: The bones of Calamity Beasts are sometimes buried in caches where their power can grow quietly.

data.name: Daring Waverider
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may cast target instant or sorcery card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text: "Look what I found!"

data.name: Dewdrop Cure
data.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Return up to two target creature cards each with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If the gift was promised, instead return up to three target creature cards each with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Diresight
data.oracle_text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
data.flavor_text: There is a fine line between predicting the future and causing it.

data.name: Fabled Passage
data.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.
data.flavor_text: Beyond Valley lies danger—and promise.

data.name: Feather of Flight
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, draw a card.
Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has flying.
data.flavor_text: As he grasped the glowing feather, the lizard's heart soared, and the rest of him quickly followed.

data.name: Festival of Embers
data.oracle_text:
During your turn, you may cast instant and sorcery spells from your graveyard by paying 1 life in addition to their other costs.
If a card or token would be put into your graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.
{1}{R}: Sacrifice this enchantment.

data.name: Fountainport Bell
data.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
{1}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Fountainport's town crier once saved the townsfolk from predation by a rottenmouth viper with only their bell.

data.name: Glarb, Calamity's Augur
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may play lands and cast spells with mana value 4 or greater from the top of your library.
{T}: Surveil 2.

data.name: Gossip's Talent
data.oracle_text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
Whenever a creature you control enters, surveil 1.
{1}{U}: Level 2
Whenever you attack, target attacking creature with power 3 or less can't be blocked this turn.
{3}{U}: Level 3
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may exile it, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

data.name: Hazel's Nocturne
data.oracle_text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: On stormy autumn days, the leaves in the trees chitter and whisper.

data.name: Heaped Harvest

When this artifact enters and when you sacrifice it, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text: One can travel all of Valley and never eat the same meal twice.

Flying

data.name: Kastral, the Windcrested

Flying

• Put a +1/+1 counter on each Bird you control.
• Draw a card.

data.name: Lightshell Duo
data.oracle_text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
data.flavor_text: "Lightning and snail as one!" cried the rat. "It's so beautiful!" the otter gasped in awe.

{T}: Add {C}.

data.name: Might of the Meek
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gains trample until end of turn. It also gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you control a Mouse.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Fear is unavoidable. You can run from it with your tail between your legs, or charge it head on with sword in hand. I prefer the latter."
—Rho, veteran hero

{2}{U/B}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: "If only you kept your secrets somewhere more secure than your delicate little skull."

data.name: Playful Shove

Playful Shove deals 1 damage to any target.

data.flavor_text: The boisterous pat on the back was painful, but not nearly as painful as the joke that inspired it.

data.name: Pond Prophet
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "The rainfall brings us news of the world around us. I've learned a lot, but most of all I've learned that it's very exciting out there!"
